ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag on this card; IP verification not in scope for this invocation.

trivia_bullets.text: Dragon's Maze (released 2013-05-03) closed the Return to Ravnica block, a three-set arc built around the ten Ravnica guilds; the Orzhov Syndicate is the white-black guild, described by community lore sources as the 'Church of Deals' — an amalgam of religion, banking, and organized crime where citizens pay tithes to the syndics. Tithe Drinker is a common Orzhov-watermarked vampire in that block. [mtg.wtf DGM/109] [MTG Wiki via WebSearch: Orzhov Syndicate]
sources: MTG Wiki (Orzhov Syndicate, via WebSearch summary)

trivia_bullets.text: Art by Slawomir Maniak. The card is a {W}{B} 2/1 Creature - Vampire with Lifelink and Extort, common rarity, Orzhov watermark, released 2013-05-03 in Dragon's Maze. [mtg.wtf DGM/109]

EDHREC tracks Tithe Drinker in roughly 19,000 of ~2.01M decks (0.95% inclusion). Its top homes are vampire-tribal and Orzhov life-drain commanders: Licia, Sanguine Tribune (36% inclusion), Astarion, the Decadent (30%), and Sorin of House Markov (29%). It pairs heavily with Sanguine Bond, Exquisite Blood, and Cruel Celebrant in those shells. [EDHREC: Tithe Drinker]

Format-wise, Tithe Drinker is best known as a Pauper staple in WB extort decks, where players run a full four copies alongside other extort commons; community discussion frames it as a strict upgrade over Syndic of Tithes because of the lifelink rider. (Note: lifelink does not trigger on the extort damage itself — only on combat damage from the creature. [MTGSalvation rumor-mill thread on Tithe Drinker]) [tappedout: Orzhov Pauper Extort] [mtggoldfish: Pauper Orzhov Extortion]

Community sentiment on the original Dragon's Maze rumor-mill thread skewed strongly positive for Limited, with one commenter calling it 'a sort-of second Syndic of Tithes for Orzhov in limited' and others arguing it 'has the potential to be better' than Syndic thanks to lifelink; the minority concern was the 1 toughness making it a poor blocker. Treat as sentiment, not consensus fact. [MTGSalvation: 'Tithe Drinker - New Card Discussion']
Tithe Drinker has no printed flavor text on the Dragon's Maze original — the card prints rules text only (Lifelink, Extort). [mtg.wtf DGM/109]

related_cards.name: Syndic of Tithes
related_cards.note: The directly-compared predecessor: same Orzhov WB extort archetype, a 1/3 human cleric. Tithe Drinker is widely framed in community discussion as the lifelink-bearing successor.

related_cards.name: Basilica Screecher
related_cards.note: Another common Orzhov extort creature from the same Return to Ravnica block; a co-staple of WB extort Pauper builds.

related_cards.name: Cruel Celebrant
related_cards.note: Top Orzhov-vampire EDHREC synergy partner — life-drain on creature death stacks with Tithe Drinker's lifelink/extort drain plan.

related_cards.name: Sanguine Bond
related_cards.note: Listed by EDHREC as a 53% inclusion synergy in the same vampire-tribal lists that play Tithe Drinker; turns each gained life into opponent loss.

related_cards.name: Exquisite Blood
related_cards.note: EDHREC 37% inclusion synergy; pairs with Tithe Drinker's lifelink and extort drain in vampire-tribal EDH shells.
